title: Promptfoo
copyText:
## Editorial notes

Promptfoo is a practical fit for teams that want repeatable prompt tests, security checks, and evaluation gates in CI.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.

# Promptfoo
Open-source prompt testing and red-teaming framework for LLM outputs, regressions, evaluations, and security checks.
